Localization.Name: Stor*All
Localization.Description: Stor*All is the largest manufacturer of storage containers in the empire, making everything from general purpose boxes to highly specialized containers for hazardous materials.

English.Name: Stor*All
English.Description: Stor*All is the largest manufacturer of storage containers in the empire, making everything from general purpose boxes to highly specialized containers for hazardous materials.

Localization.Name: GSX-EX
Localization.Description:
Manufacturer: Stor*All
Item Type: Fuel Pod
Hydrogen Flow Modifier: 0.45
Quantum Flow Modifier: 0.45
Max. Integrity: 21000
Capacity: 32 SCU

The Stor*All GSX-EX offers an impressive combination of premium size and protection, and should be given serious consideration when refueling speed is less of a priority.
